description: Scaffold the Next.js project with Tailwind CSS and create a complete Linear-style landing page with dark theme, hero section, features section, navigation, and footer.
steps: Initialize a new Next.js project in /projects/sandbox/jvfhiwcj using 'npx create-next-app@latest . --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app --src-dir --no-import-alias --use-npm'. If the directory is not empty, handle by working with existing files or adjusting the approach.

Configure tailwind.config.ts with a custom dark theme: extend colors with purple/violet/blue gradient palette (matching Linear's aesthetic), add custom animations for fade-in, slide-up, and pulse-glow effects.
Set up app/layout.tsx with Inter font from next/font/google, dark background (bg-[#0A0A0F] or similar very dark purple-black), and proper metadata.

Create a Navbar component in src/components/Navbar.tsx: fixed position, glassmorphism background (backdrop-blur + semi-transparent bg), logo text, navigation links with hover animations (opacity transitions, subtle underline effects), and a CTA button with gradient border.

Create a Hero section component in src/components/Hero.tsx: large bold headline with gradient text (purple to blue), descriptive subheadline in muted gray, two CTA buttons (primary with gradient fill, secondary with border-only ghost style), subtle background radial gradient or glow orb behind the text.

Create a Features section component in src/components/Features.tsx: section title, grid of 3-6 feature cards. Each card has: dark card background with subtle border (border-white/10), icon or emoji, title, description, hover effect that increases border brightness or adds a subtle glow. Use glassmorphism style.
Create a Footer component in src/components/Footer.tsx: minimal footer with links in columns, muted text colors, subtle top border, consistent with the overall dark theme.
Assemble all components in src/app/page.tsx: Navbar at top, Hero section, Features section, Footer at bottom. Add a subtle animated gradient orb or mesh background element for visual interest.
Add global styles in src/app/globals.css: smooth scrolling, custom scrollbar styling for dark theme, any additional utility classes needed for glassmorphism or gradient text effects.
Ensure fully responsive design: test that layout works well from mobile (375px) to desktop (1440px+). Use responsive Tailwind classes (sm:, md:, lg:) throughout.
acceptance_criteria: Running 'npm run build' completes without errors
The page renders a dark-themed landing page with Linear-style aesthetics
Navigation bar is present with glassmorphism effect
Hero section displays gradient text headline and CTA buttons
Features section shows cards with hover effects
Footer is present with proper styling
Smooth CSS transitions and animations are applied to interactive elements
findings: create-next-app could not run in a non-empty directory, so the project was manually scaffolded with package.json and all config files. Used Tailwind CSS v4 with @tailwindcss/postcss plugin and @theme directive in globals.css for custom animations. Build completes successfully with Next.js 15.5.18.
